description: PUA Codex hooks: frustration triggers, failure-pattern reminders, local state continuity, integrity guard, and stop-loop continuation.

hooks.command: python3 -c 'import os,runpy,sys;from pathlib import Path;h=Path.home();roots=[];e=os.environ.get("PUA_CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT");roots+=([Path(e)] if e else []);cache=h/".codex"/"plugins"/"cache";roots+=([p.parents[1] for p in sorted(cache.glob("*/pua-codex/*/scripts/pua_hook.py"),key=lambda p:p.stat().st_mtime,reverse=True)] if cache.exists() else []);roots.append(h/"plugins"/"pua-codex");s=next((r/"scripts"/"pua_hook.py" for r in roots if (r/"scripts"/"pua_hook.py").is_file()),None);sys.argv=[str(s)]+sys.argv[1:] if s else sys.exit("pua-codex hook not found");sys.path.insert(0,str(s.parent));runpy.run_path(str(s),run_name="__main__")' UserPromptSubmit
hooks.commandWindows: python -c "import os,runpy,sys;from pathlib import Path;h=Path.home();roots=[];e=os.environ.get('PUA_CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT');roots+=([Path(e)] if e else []);cache=h/'.codex'/'plugins'/'cache';roots+=([p.parents[1] for p in sorted(cache.glob('*/pua-codex/*/scripts/pua_hook.py'),key=lambda p:p.stat().st_mtime,reverse=True)] if cache.exists() else []);roots.append(h/'plugins'/'pua-codex');s=next((r/'scripts'/'pua_hook.py' for r in roots if (r/'scripts'/'pua_hook.py').is_file()),None);sys.argv=[str(s)]+sys.argv[1:] if s else sys.exit('pua-codex hook not found');sys.path.insert(0,str(s.parent));runpy.run_path(str(s),run_name='__main__')" UserPromptSubmit
